about.label: [ + ] A BIT MORE ABOUT ME
about.bio1: Hey — I'm Corneliu Secrieri, a developer & designer based in Vienna. I work solo at co-studio — websites, apps, graphics, video. Modern minimalism, sometimes deliberately complex.
about.bio2: Born in Romania, grew up there and in Austria. When I'm not shipping React, WordPress, or Swift / Expo projects, I'm making music, editing video, or hunting decent coffee. co-studio is my playground for tech and sound — code meets craft ツ

pifx.title: πf(x)
pifx.desc: Audio multi-effects device on a Raspberry Pi — HTL final thesis. Real-time DSP in C++, from hardware design to software.
pifx.longDesc: πf(x) is the HTL Diplomarbeit (final thesis) built together with Moritz Metzinger at HTL Informationstechnologie / Medientechnik (2025/26). The project is a standalone audio multi-effects unit powered by a Raspberry Pi with a Behringer UCA222 audio interface. Audio is processed in real-time via a C++ DSP engine with effects including filters, delay, reverb, distortion, modulation, and dynamics — all running on embedded Linux. Covers the full stack: acoustics theory, digital signal processing, embedded hardware design, and C++ software.

cobible.title: co.bible
cobible.desc: Native iOS Bible app in Swift — multiple translations, active reading and quiz duels against others to become the top player.
cobible.longDesc: co.bible is a native iOS Bible app built entirely in Swift. The core feature: compare multiple Bible translations, read actively, and challenge others in quiz duels — who knows the Bible best?

bibelsuche.title: Bibelsuche
bibelsuche.desc: Desktop app for macOS & Windows — search Bible verses across translations at lightning speed, built with Tauri & React.
bibelsuche.longDesc: Bibelsuche is a fast, modern desktop app for macOS and Windows. Search Bible verses across multiple translations (Zefania XML) at lightning speed — built with Tauri (Rust backend) and React + Vite on the frontend. Native performance, web technologies.

vsmannersdorf.title: VS Mannersdorf
vsmannersdorf.desc: Modern React website for the primary school Mannersdorf am Leithagebirge (Lower Austria) — React + Vite, CSS Modules, no component library.
vsmannersdorf.longDesc: Modern website for the primary school Mannersdorf am Leithagebirge (Lower Austria). Built entirely with React + Vite, styled exclusively with CSS Modules — no component library or UI framework. Clean, accessible design for students, parents, and staff.

about_page.bio: I'm Corneliu Secrieri — developer, designer, and video editor running co-studio solo from Vienna. I build websites (WordPress & React), apps (Swift, Expo, Ionic), graphics (logos, flyers, posters), and video with VFX when the project calls for it.
about_page.p1: It started with my first computer — taking things apart, putting them back together, and figuring out how they tick. Long before HTL, I was already tinkering, breaking, and fixing.
about_page.p2: Born in Romania, I spent my childhood there, then completed my entire school path in Austria — ending with HTL IT, focus on Media Technology. Alongside school I ran private projects and classic village IT support: Windows installs, drivers, software — the real-world helpdesk.
about_page.p3: Today I love modern, minimal interfaces — but I'm not afraid of complex layouts when the story needs it. Stack-wise you'll find me in React, Angular, WordPress, Swift, Expo, Python, Java, SQL, Docker, and more.
about_page.p4: co-studio (founded 2026) is my personal studio for everything that excites me — client work, own apps, design, video, and long-term: music production under the same roof.

exp1.desc: My own studio — web, apps, graphics, video. Projects that matter to me and clients who care about craft.

exp2.desc: HTL Informationstechnologie, side projects with school knowledge, WordPress/React experiments, first real client work.

exp3.desc: First PC, pre-HTL hacking, IT support for people in my village — installs, drivers, troubleshooting.

overview.p: I take the protection of your personal data seriously. This policy explains what data may be processed when you visit this website and how you can exercise your rights under the GDPR.

hosting.p: When you access the site, the hosting provider may process technical data (e.g. IP address, browser type, time of access) in server logs for security and operation. Legal basis: legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

contact.p: If you contact me by email, phone, or the contact form, I process the data you provide to handle your request. The form is delivered via Web3Forms (Web3Forms Inc.) to my email address. For appointments you may use my booking page (Google Ireland Ltd.). Legal basis: pre-contractual measures / contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) or legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

cookies.p: We use only technically necessary storage: your language choice is saved locally in the browser (localStorage, key i18nextLng). We do not use marketing, analytics, or third-party tracking cookies. You can delete stored data at any time in your browser settings. A short notice appears once on first visit.

rights.p: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection. You may lodge a complaint with the Austrian Data Protection Authority (dsb.gv.at). Contact me at the address above for any request.

changes.p: This policy may be updated. The current version is always available on this page. Last updated: 2026.

web.tagline: From landing pages and CMS builds to full-stack React apps — built clean, built fast, built to last.
web.desc: Whether you need a high-performance React app, a flexible WordPress site, or a custom backend — I cover the full stack. Every project is designed with maintainability in mind: clean code, documented structure, and sensible architecture. No bloat, no overcomplicated setups.

process.title: Discovery
process.desc: Goals, tech requirements, scope — mapped out before a single line of code.

process.title: Design
process.desc: Wireframes and UI concepts in Figma, agreed before development starts.

process.title: Build
process.desc: Clean, component-driven development with regular check-ins.

app.tagline: Native and cross-platform mobile apps — from concept to App Store. Built to feel right on any screen.
app.desc: Mobile apps that don't feel like mobile apps. Whether it's a native Swift experience for iOS or a cross-platform build with Expo and React Native — the focus is always on performance, feel, and clean UI. I handle the full lifecycle: concept, design, build, and release.

process.title: Concept
process.desc: Feature scope, platform decisions, user flow — defined before design.

process.title: Prototype
process.desc: Interactive prototype to validate UX before full build.

process.title: Build
process.desc: Iterative development with milestone reviews and beta testing.

process.title: Release
process.desc: App Store / Play Store submission, monitoring, and post-launch support.

design.tagline: Logos, interfaces, and print — everything designed to ship. Modern minimalism, sometimes deliberately complex.
design.desc: Design that doesn't just look good but works. From a brand identity that holds up across every touchpoint, to a UI system a developer can actually build from — I design with purpose. Clean grids, strong type, intentional colour.

process.title: Brief
process.desc: Understanding the brand, audience, and visual goals.

process.title: Concept
process.desc: Moodboards, sketches, and direction — agreed before full execution.

process.title: Design
process.desc: Full execution in Figma with revisions included.

process.title: Deliver
process.desc: Export-ready files in all required formats plus style guide.

video.tagline: Cuts, motion, and effects — for content that needs to hit harder.
video.desc: Video that moves. Whether it's a fast-cut promo, a motion graphics piece, or a full VFX sequence — I bring technical precision and a strong visual sense. Edited for the platform it's meant to live on, mixed properly, and delivered on time.
deliverables: Export in all required formats & resolutions

process.title: Brief
process.desc: Platform, tone, length, references — everything that shapes the cut.

process.title: Cut
process.desc: Rough edit delivered for feedback before VFX and colour.

process.title: Effects
process.desc: Motion graphics, VFX, and colour grading applied.

process.title: Export
process.desc: Final delivery in all required formats with project archive.
